data.title: Distributor ARG Industrial rolls out mobile app to streamline ecommerce
data.description: The distributor expects the introduction of the app to improve operational efficiency in multiple ways, including centralizing inventory data and incorporating real-time tracking of orders to reduces miscommunication.

data.title: Furniture.com brings in firmly to simplify its platform's discovery process
data.description: Firmly, which earlier this year announced it was working with Perplexity, will bring its checkout technology to Furniture.com's shoppers.

data.title: eBay reveals new technology for sellers at OPEN25
data.description: It said each of the features "represents a step forward in eBay’s mission to help sellers thrive" and to support the 2.4 billion listings on its marketplace.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How Target is using AI
data.description: Target has a history of AI and machine learnings use internally, and its COO wants to expand efforts amid turnaround efforts.

data.title: Report: AI is everywhere, but B2B firms struggle to find value
data.description: Many employees lack adequate training, with only 36%  feeling prepared to use AI effectively, says a new report from Boston Consulting Group.
